## Summary

- what changed
- which area changed: CLI, docs, smoke, or release tooling
- why the change is needed

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm smoke:cli` if the CLI, templates, or package wiring changed

## Notes

- mention any publish or deploy impact
- mention any follow-up work
